title: oenothera eriensis var. niagarensis
intro: Oenothera eriensis var. niagarensis, also known as the Niagara Evening Primrose, is a perennial flowering plant native to eastern North America. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera eriensis var. niagarensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
